name: wuyun
description: Autonomous vulnerability research skill suite for authorized code audits, Web/API review, AI security, supply-chain triage, red/purple-team planning, and agent extension security.

interface.longDescription: Wuyun routes authorized security research tasks across Web/API, cloud, JS reverse engineering, browser runtime, auth, AI, recon, exploit-assist, red/purple-team planning, skill/MCP security, and supply-chain audit workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use $wuyun to audit this repo safely.
Use $wuyun to review this PR for security risk.
Use $wuyun to audit this skill/MCP config.
